scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && bun build ./cgtjs/index.ts --outfile dist/index.js --format esm && dts-bundle-generator -o dist/index.d.ts --project tsconfig.build.json --no-banner cgtjs/index.ts
scripts.prepare: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && bun build ./cgtjs/index.ts --outfile dist/index.js --format esm && dts-bundle-generator -o dist/index.d.ts --project tsconfig.build.json --no-banner cgtjs/index.ts
